description: This convenient 3-pack of Amazon Basics Vanity Mirrors with Heavy Base is perfect for multi-user households or placing in multiple rooms. Each double-sided mirror rotates 360 degrees and offers 1x and 5x magnification for all your grooming needs. The iron-coated construction and extra heavy base provide stability, while the white finish blends with any decor. Mirror diameter: 6.69 inches. Package dimensions: 15.2 x 9.2 x 21.2 inches; total weight: 9.72 pounds. Clean with a dry cloth; do not use solvent-based cleaners.
